name: codex-simple-work-package
title: codex-simple-work-package
description: Lightweight Codex workflow for small code or documentation changes when no dedicated workflow applies. It implements with Codex GPT-5.6 SOL high effort, reviews the diff, and loops back only for high or middle findings.
